challenges.title: Float Shape with Circle
challenges.description: Write CSS that uses `shape-outside: circle()` on a floated element. Create a rule for `.shaped` that floats it left and applies `shape-outside: circle(50%)`. Also set a width and height of 200px. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert 'shape-outside' in css.lower(), 'Should use shape-outside property'
assert 'circle(' in css.lower(), 'Should use circle() function'
assert 'float' in css.lower(), 'Should float the element'
assert 'left' in css.lower(), 'Should float left'
hints: shape-outside only works on floated elements
Use shape-outside: circle(50%) to wrap text around a circular shape

challenges.title: Polygon Shape with Margin
challenges.description: Write CSS that uses `shape-outside` with `polygon()` to create a custom float shape, and adds `shape-margin` for spacing. Create a rule for `.polygon-shape` that floats right, sets a width and height of 300px, uses `shape-outside: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%)` to create a triangle shape, and applies `shape-margin: 15px`. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert 'shape-outside' in css.lower(), 'Should use shape-outside property'
assert 'polygon(' in css.lower(), 'Should use polygon() function'
assert 'shape-margin' in css.lower(), 'Should use shape-margin for spacing'
assert 'float' in css.lower(), 'Should float the element'
assert 'right' in css.lower(), 'Should float right'
hints: polygon() takes a list of x y coordinate pairs separated by commas
shape-margin adds space between the shape boundary and surrounding content
